en: Whoever loves discipline loves knowledge, but he who hates reproof is stupid.
zh: 喜愛教訓的，就是喜愛知識； 厭惡責備的，卻是愚頑人。

en: A good man obtains favor from the LORD, but a man of evil devices he condemns.
zh: 良善的人必得到耶和華的恩寵； 圖謀奸計的人，耶和華必把他定罪。

en: No one is established by wickedness, but the root of the righteous will never be moved.
zh: 人不能恃憑惡行堅立； 但義人的根必不動搖。

en: An excellent wife is the crown of her husband, but she who brings shame is like rottenness in his bones.
zh: 有才德的妻子是丈夫的冠冕， 貽羞的婦人，如同丈夫骨中的朽爛。

en: The thoughts of the righteous are just; the counsels of the wicked are deceitful.
zh: 義人的籌算是公平， 惡人的計謀卻是詭詐。

en: The words of the wicked lie in wait for blood, but the mouth of the upright delivers them.
zh: 惡人的言語埋伏著，等待要流人的血， 正直人的口能拯救人。

en: The wicked are overthrown and are no more, but the house of the righteous will stand.
zh: 惡人傾覆，就不再存在； 義人的家卻必站立得住。

en: A man is commended according to his good sense, but one of twisted mind is despised.
zh: 人因著自己的明慧必得稱讚， 但心中乖謬的必被藐視。

en: Better to be lowly and have a servant than to play the great man and lack bread.
zh: 被人輕看卻有僕人的人， 勝過自尊自大卻缺少食物的人。

en: Whoever is righteous has regard for the life of his beast, but the mercy of the wicked is cruel.
zh: 義人連自己牲畜的性命也顧惜； 但惡人的憐憫也是殘忍。

en: Whoever works his land will have plenty of bread, but he who follows worthless pursuits lacks sense.
zh: 耕種自己田地的，也有充足的糧食； 追求虛幻的，實在無知。

en: Whoever is wicked covets the spoil of evildoers, but the root of the righteous bears fruit.
zh: 惡人貪慕壞人的網羅； 義人的根得以結果。

en: An evil man is ensnared by the transgression of his lips, but the righteous escapes from trouble.
zh: 壞人嘴裡的過失，是自己的網羅； 但義人必脫離患難。

en: From the fruit of his mouth a man is satisfied with good, and the work of a man's hand comes back to him.
zh: 人因口所結的果子必飽嘗美物； 人手所作的必歸到他身上。

en: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes, but a wise man listens to advice.
zh: 愚妄人所行的，在自己眼中看為正直， 只有智慧人肯聽勸告。

en: The vexation of a fool is known at once, but the prudent ignores an insult.
zh: 愚妄人的惱怒立時顯露， 精明的人卻能忍受羞辱。

en: Whoever speaks the truth gives honest evidence, but a false witness utters deceit.
zh: 吐露真情的，彰顯正義， 作假見證的卻是詭詐。

en: There is one whose rash words are like sword thrusts, but the tongue of the wise brings healing.
zh: 有人說話不慎，好像利刀刺人， 智慧人的舌頭卻能醫治人。

en: Truthful lips endure forever, but a lying tongue is but for a moment.
zh: 說實話的嘴唇，永遠堅立； 撒謊的舌頭，眨眼間消失。

en: Deceit is in the heart of those who devise evil, but those who plan peace have joy.
zh: 圖謀惡事的，心存詭詐； 使人和睦的，心中喜樂。

en: No ill befalls the righteous, but the wicked are filled with trouble.
zh: 義人不會遭遇災禍， 惡人卻飽經禍患。

en: Lying lips are an abomination to the LORD, but those who act faithfully are his delight.
zh: 撒謊的嘴唇是耶和華憎惡的； 行事誠實是他所喜悅的。

en: A prudent man conceals knowledge, but the heart of fools proclaims folly.
zh: 精明的人隱藏自己的知識， 愚昧人的心卻顯出愚妄。

en: The hand of the diligent will rule, while the slothful will be put to forced labor.
zh: 殷勤人的手必掌權， 懶惰人的手必作苦工。

en: Anxiety in a man's heart weighs him down, but a good word makes him glad.
zh: 心中憂慮，使人消沉； 一句良言使他歡喜。

en: One who is righteous is a guide to his neighbor, but the way of the wicked leads them astray.
zh: 義人作自己鄰舍的引導； 惡人的道路，卻使別人走迷。

en: Whoever is slothful will not roast his game, but the diligent man will get precious wealth.
zh: 懶惰的人不去燒烤他的獵物， 殷勤的人卻得寶貴的財物 。

en: In the path of righteousness is life, and in its pathway there is no death.
zh: 在公義的路上有生命， 這路徑之上沒有死亡 。
